question: Implement a `Time` class with private attributes `hours`, `minutes`, and `seconds` (all integers). Overload the `==` operator to compare two `Time` objects for equality (i.e., they represent the exact same time).
errors: Attempt to access private members (hours, minutes, seconds) of `Time` objects from a non-member, non-friend function (`operator==`). This violates C++ encapsulation rules and results in a compile-time error.
